reviews.review_description: Can you please add more tracks with dramatic weather rain night time driving we're working on nighttime headlights More levels more tracks please with tunnels jumps if you can add jumps and that time driving like actual night time driving not that city one you got which need to be upgraded to more of a city night time driving and people walking around and cars that look like actual car driving around if you can add that I living city there's no crowd around or nothing and none of the levels add more cars and trucks if you can thank you

developer_response.body: Thank you for such a detailed and thoughtful review! I really appreciate your feedback and support. I’ll definitely take your suggestions into consideration for future updates.

reviews.review_description: I can't progress in the game because it isn't counting laps on the tracks, kinda bummed... :(

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! I hear you, and I’ve just released an update (v0.981) that fixes the lap counting issue. I hope you’ll enjoy the game, and thank you for your patience and support.

reviews.review_title: no update in 3 months. so 3 stars
reviews.review_description: You never update this game while even the smallest developers update their games and talk to us. you don't have to talk but show your own game some love. dont u like it , maybe not

Add turn signals, reflection in mirrors, I train driving a car, but the game does not allow you to navigate by mirrors. You have the opportunity to be the first on the market with a driving training game
Just ripping around nice tracks with nice wheels.. Great way to spend time. I look forward to new tracks, cars and whatever is created for it.. Thank you for all the hard work

reviews.review_title: I want to change it back to 5 star
reviews.review_description: The new update is horrible, when you leg go of the gas the entire audio of the engine stops. Also during this update I lost my coins and had to restart at square 1. However this was one of my favorite games before the most recent update.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thanks for your feedback. We have improved the sound of the cars in the new update V0.91, which is already available for download. I hope this game will remain one of your favorites in the future.

reviews.review_description: I didn't think the game would ever update again but I was wrong the update and really good but the only thing I want is purchasable coins

Just got this game today and wow it's very good, the problem people say about the steering is not a problem if you drive one handed and have the other hand ready to change gear I've just played it for 1hr 30mins no problem. It would to nice to change volume between engine sound and music, also racing other cars but maybe it's to much for the quest to do, anyway I'm playing a racing game in VR on the quest brilliant! Ps only £4.49.

reviews.review_title: Game is fun, but needs a few tweaks.
reviews.review_description:
1. The automatic cars do not downshift soon enough when you let go of the throttle and turn, causing the car to have low acceleration once you engage the throttle again.

2. Needs an options menu to tweak sound effect volume and music volume.

3. Sometimes you don't get coins when completing a time-attack race.

Other than that, I love the game and love the handling model.
Been awhile this game has to update "for now"  is now. Dont waste money good concept though bad follow through.

developer_response.body: Hello! Thanks for your feedback. After a forced delay, we have released a new update, which is already available for download. The new track is already waiting for you to try it out.

reviews.review_description:
I enjoyed the look of the game, the choices one can make and the different cars you can choose from,  BUT... This is 2022 and no one born after 1975 has learned how to drive a stick shift and YOU give NO instructions on how to.  I'm pushing 60 and NEVER in my life did I have to learn or even want/need to learn how to drive a manual car.  

The majority of your game players are going to be under the age of 25 and might not have ever seen a manual transmission!  

I know there are a few automatic transmissions but you first have to actually earn money driving the cars to get that cash, and that can take a LONG time to get up to the money needed for an automatic. 

I fought with the first car you get for a while but was able to buy the Corvette.  The first car I had NO trouble handling and keeping it on the road.  Once I got it up to full speed I never let off the gas and topped it out at 210 mph and never crashed, I   Did the track in 1:11:00 That may not sound great but for a guy who has NO idea how to drive a stick, I am proud. 

I got in the Corvette and the second I touched the gas the car was OFF the road. It had NO control as the first car did.  Ended up on a guard rail shortly into the run and was struck.  

No matter where you are in the world, you should have been able to hear me swear!  

I think you should allow automatic cars right from the beginning and not have to earn 7 grand or more to buy one. I wasted 4 grand on a corvette so getting up to 7 grand again will take a lot of time and anger.
graphic is good，and many Cars can be choosen and and，the scenses are beautiful,good job,well done,love this game

In my opinion this is the best racing game for Quest. The only complaint: the manual transmission is not very handy because unlike a real car you can't fumble blindly. It's worth thinking about making the gearshift to buttons or adding an automatic transmission.

this is still one of the best racing games out there!! your most recent update is incredible! keep up the great work! thanks for more cars too! 
sincenyou followed up on the WILLY'S idea, how about that 1965 shellby cobra? 
 the damage is a nice touch too.  i do think that the difference in price from the Porsche to the lambo is pretty high, but i thank ya for the opportunity to drive them.  
 i am telling others to check this game out, so keep the updates coming!

This is an amazing experience. The car interior is realistic and you have multiple vehicles to drive, plus multiple enviroments

I didn't know how to drive stick until I got this game. Now I'm somewhat of a pro

I'd  love to see a automatic transmission in the future...

But Overall I'm super satisfied with this game!!!
This game is super good for its price. Graphics are amazing and it's really fun. I think the devs should add another mode where you could race other cars. It would make it even better!

developer_response.body: Hi. Thanks for your feedback. We are glad that you liked our game. We are still working on it and it will get even better in the future.

reviews.review_description:
Really cool, most realistic driving sim I’ve seen on the quest by far graphic-wise. Handling? Not so much. First off, I don’t like driving manually, there should be an option to drive automatic, and if you’re gonna force us to drive manually, at the very least, give more feedback on switching of gears, whether it be your controller vibrating or being able to see which gear you’re in at the corner of the window so you don’t have to constantly keep looking down. Steering wheel doesn’t work like a real steering wheel should, always stays in the same position you let go of it in. Can’t really complain too much though because it isn’t the full release, which is why I’m giving it 4/5 stars. It’s alright for the price I guess, but for now all I can do is wait for the game to be fully released, and I know it’s going to be good. A lotttt of potential in this game and I’m excited to see the end result.

Update:
Spent a good couple hours learning to drive stick and my god is this game fun. You have to learn to drive a specific way though by adapting to certain issues with the steering wheel. Sometimes it gives problems, probably mostly due to the fact that there isn’t a physical wheel, and sometimes when I grab the stick to shift gears, the controller refuses to grip. Would be only a minor annoyance if it didn’t happen 5 times per round. But other than that when you’re flooring it, zooming through a city at night, music blasting, this game begins to feel a little unreal and is extremely fun. Love the graphics too. Obviously could be way better, but until I can get a PC, this is the best racing game available for the Quest 2.

developer_response.body: Hi. Thanks for your feedback. We are glad that you enjoyed the game. In the game you have a car with a mechanical and automatic transmission. At the moment, cars with automatic gearboxes are the last in the store's list. Also, the automatic transmission mode works when you turn on the third-person view. We will take into account your opinion about the game in the future development.

reviews.review_description: Polished racing game
At last. A decent racer for the Quest! No shooting or other silly stuff. Smooth, straight, nice. Thank you!

reviews.review_title: One of the best games on the Quest
reviews.review_description: This is my new favorite game to play on the quest. I really enjoy the mechanics, good driving experience.

developer_response.body: Hello. Thank you for your feedback, we are glad that you like our game. Enjoy your ride.

reviews.review_description:
I Enjoyed the version for the gear vr but I definitely love the quest version. Here's some suggestions: bgm on/off
maybe add some people walking around 
HAND tracking 
Graphics increase option 
Thanks

developer_response.body: Hi. Thanks for your feedback. We will take into account your opinion on improving the game in the future.

reviews.review_title: I want to drift please make it more real
reviews.review_description: Drift please

developer_response.body: Hello. Thank you for your feedback, we will take into account your wishes.

reviews.review_description:
Love the recent update.

Things i would like to see is arm and hand physics or at least see them while driving

reviews.review_title: Great game with lots of potential
reviews.review_description:
I really like this game and the price is great if u are considering getting it I totally recommend it but I do have a few suggestions for the devs

Keep in mind i will be only taking abt the not so good parts of this game so don’t take this next part as what u can expect from the game

So far the game is great but I feel like it could be even better with some different modes like where u could race against bots or a mode where u could get a car that’s good for drifting and a race on a drifting map.
At the moment when u join the game u only get 1 car that u have to use until u buy a better car, with that first car I don’t think it’s physically possible to get more than 1 star in any of the maps and with that 1 slow car u have to grind for so long just to get ur next car and u find ur self driving around the last map that gets u the best amount of money for ur time and every lap just feels the same like occasionally u might crash and that would be the only different thing that would happen to u in about 5 laps of the map, once u get a faster car it’s a little better but I just feel like the replay ability is there it’s just not as fun as it could be which I feel could be fixed with other game modes or like a good if u really wanna stick to the time attack modes u could add a drifting mode or something
Also please just make the start of the game a little less challenging and grindy

Also some settings would be nice like if u could add some settings to adjust the background music or change the binds or something

But overall I really do think u guys have made a great game with so much potential and are selling it for a great price.
 I am excited for any future updates that may be coming and if the devs would like to contact me, here is my email:
jaistheguy@gmail.com
Don’t judge my email😂😂😂

Ps:
Also if u guys ever added multiplayer where u could race ur friends I don’t think I would ever see sun light ever again, I would sit here playing it all day

developer_response.body: Hi. Thanks for your feedback. We are glad that you liked the game and would like to improve it. We will take into account your opinion about the game in further development.

reviews.review_description: Very good, grind for money for the cars... terrible

A perfect basis for a top game. 
Maybe some little ideas. Show technical data in the windshield,
No music during the race, it drowns out the beautiful racing sounds.
I can't wait to see how the game will grow.
 Good luck!

For the driving experience, it’s my favorite racing game on quest 2 so far. You may find other racing simulator game on Quest 2. I like this most because no one like this game. It really gives me a lot of fun for driving and smooth driving experience. I was wondering if this game is good enough to me. After checking the review, I decide to give it a try. All I is need is a simple race game! And it really satisfied me.

With 5.99 USD, it’s fair to not to expect to get complete super high level game. No competitors, no car tuning options, no upgrade options. I can only paint the car and drive the car. But this game really focus on the driving and racing. To me, it’s the key of the driving game! Great racing wheel design ( I know how hard to design it for the VR controller), the great manual gear (it gives the game the unique control experience that other same level games never give it.) Both makes this game more special!

Looking for the future update! Thank you for making a good racing game to people who have no PCVR. Great job! 5 stars for the price and the gaming experience. I love it. 

This will be something if the design team wants to give it more!

Quick question, can you make the game can be played with/without internet in the future? I think it will be a great feature to take out quest 2 and play it anytime! Feel free to add me on Oculus if you need tester. 😉 or it’s time to have a discord 🤣

developer_response.body: Hi. Thank you for your feedback and for appreciating the in-game driving experience. We really focused on the driving mechanics in the game and made it as realistic as possible in VR. We will continue to improve the game further.

reviews.review_description: Wish there was drifting and settings in the game im not left handed and the controls are like inverted, that and the steering doesn't work proper at all.

developer_response.body: Hi. Thanks for your feedback. We are still working on the game and it will get better in the future.

reviews.review_description: Great game

Really simple and enjoyable. I look forward to updates. One trouble, I'm right handed and I can't change gear in car accelerate at same time (layout says left hand accelerate but it's right in reality). Any chance of off road or rally option? I'd pay !! Keep up good work Devs !!

reviews.review_title: Overall good, but could be improved
reviews.review_description: The mechanics and everything is fine, but like most people said, the shifter isn't very intuitive, doesn't have any feedback and slides around a lot, making you look at the gear shifter and crash. Other than that an awesome game, would be infinitely better and a definite hit if it included multi-player

I like it ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

In my opinion this game needs automatic transmission and racing with AI, not only time attack
